data.body: OPERATOR ATTESTATION (2026-07-11, concrete, corrected shas): the fsck reconciliation is applied via two commits on the tickets orphan branch — d20657136 ('store(fsck): retire 13 benign pre-snapshot orphan EDITs + drop 4 local phantom dirs') and 4e9bf2aa6 ('store(fsck): retire the 13th orphan EDIT (fa98) + drop cf5d phantom dir'). Verified: git confirms the 13 orphan EDIT files are now tracked as .json.retired and the non-.retired originals are gone; the 4 phantom dirs (110e/957d/9fa4/cf5d) are removed. 'rebar fsck' from the main-2d1524ad8 (ENQUEUE_ENRICH-era) binary reports 'fsck complete: no issues found' (0 orphan_event, 0 missing_create; was 17). Before/after library read of all 13 orphan tickets is identical: all status=closed; assignee='' except cc5b and f112 = 'Joe Oakhart'.
